name: Muffallatas and Olive Dressing from: My Lovin
recipeInstructions:
Bake the muffallata in a 350°F oven for 15 minutes or until the cheese melts. Cut into quarters and serve with olive dressing.
Olive Dressing
Mash up salad olives, diced onions, pickled cauliflower, celery stalks, and garlic cloves. Mix in Italian seasoning. Cover with olive oil and let stand overnight.
